title: [DO NOT MERGE] pet PR for c/image#701
body:
go mod edit -replace github.com/containers/image=github.com/lsm5/containers-image@master-
openssl-wip

make vendor

go get github.com/containers/libtrust

make vendor

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

pet PR as per [this comment](https://github.com/containers/libtrust/pull/3#issuecomment-531666207).
@vrothberg PTAL

comments.body: @vrothberg if you're still around, CI is green, so hopefully c/image PR should be good for merge??
@vrothberg so with go 1.11 on ubuntu 18.04, I could see more untracked files, updated PR.
LGTM ... once the c/image PR is merged, we need to drop the replace in this PR here and can merge
(For the record, this can’t be merged right now because it does not correspond to what #701 ultimately did.)
@lsm5 Assuming this is no longer necessary, please reopen if that’s not the case.
